title: Medication Reconciliation Incomplete Before Execution
scenario: A medication order depends on completed medication reconciliation, but reconciliation remains incomplete.
initial_state: The medication workflow was authorized pending medication reconciliation.
state_transition: Execution is attempted before reconciliation is completed.
execution_boundary: Medication administration is evaluated before execution.
constitutional_evaluation: Execution requires reconstruction of medication dependency state.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because medication reconciliation is an unsatisfied dependency.
proof_conclusion: Medication execution must fail closed when reconciliation dependencies remain incomplete.
